titleStmt.title: SII 10.489: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 489. (A.R. No. 296 of 1924.) ON A SLAB LYING IN THE ZAMINDAR'S RESIDENCE, NAḌIGŪḌEM, NANDIGAMA TALUK, KRISHNA DISTRICT. Ś. 1222. (Śārvari)

summary.p: States that the residents of Tāḍuvāya assigned to the temple of Chenna-Mallikārjuna of that village two vīsas in every māḍa of the income of the village, that the residents of Nelamaṟṟi made a similar assignment to the same temple in regard to the income of Nelamaṟṟi and that agasāla Dēvōja made a gift of a palmyra tope to the same temple. The gifts were made for the merit of the Mahāsāmanta Māraya-Gaṇapaya-Raḍḍi during the reign of Pratāpa-Rudradēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nama stuṁgaśira
ścuṁbicaṁdracā
maracārayēt .
trayilōkyanaga
raraṁbhamūla
staṁbhāya śaṁbha
vē . svasti śrī śakava
varṣaṁbulu 1222
Agu nēṁṭi śārvvari
saṁvvatsara kārtti
ka śu 15 śu . svasti
śrīmanumahā
maṁḍalēśvara kā
katiyya pratāpa
rudradēvama
hārājulu pri
thivi rājyamu sē
yucuṁḍaṁ
gānu . svasti śrīmaṁ
nmahāsāmaṁtta ceṟa
kujagaddāḷu māra
yagaṇapayaraḍḍivāriki

ṁ buṇyamugānu tā
ḍuvāya śrīcennama
llikārjjunamahāliṁga
dēvuniki Aṁdula sa
mastaprajānu kētūle
ṁkaṁgāruṁnnu Ācaṁdrā
rkkasthāyigānu Aṁgaraṁga
bhōgānakuṁ dāḍuvāya
sarvāyamaṁdunnu gaṭenā
na māḍabaḍi reṁḍēsi vī
sāla lekkanu Icciri .
Idēvunike nelamaṟṟi sa
masta prajānu Āyū
ri sarvvāyamaṁddunnu
yikramānane Icciri .
Agasāladēvōju tā
ṁ beṭna yeḍimaḍatā
ṭivanamu Idēvuni
kē dīpālaku Iccenu .
Idharmmaṁ Evvarēni Iddi pra
tipāliṁturu vāriki
Anēka dhaṁrmmālu sēsina pha
lamu . svadattā dviguṇa
ṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu
pālanaṁ . paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpha
laṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 10.489 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
